text: Here, surrounded by glass and careful design, I feel suspended between clarity and uncertainty. The world is organized, yet my tilted perspective disorients me. Moving into the second image, vibrant color and the language of research and development fill the senses—here, curiosity awakens. I feel like a visitor in a temple of innovation, standing at the threshold between the known and the unknown, eager to understand how humans and machines might coexist. There is a sense of anticipation, as if the future is sliding into focus before my eyes.
